criterion_results.text: No American spellings present in the narrative (color, optimize, behavior, organize, center, defense, license as a verb, analyze) — Australian or neutral forms both pass

criterion_results.text: Report includes the canonical sections: "Unit Economics Model — [Business Name]"

judge_result.notes: Artefact is thorough with clear calculations, explicit inputs/assumptions, and Australian-friendly spellings throughout. Two of three criteria are met substantively. The third criterion fails on literal heading format — the canonical title 'Unit Economics Model — [Business Name]' is replaced with a different formulation ('Unit Economics: Spark Digital -- ...'), so the verdict is partial rather than pass.
